predictions.title: Schumann Resonance ≥7.85 Hz during Solar Wind >5 nPa

predictions.title: NMP Drift: Poleward Dominant over Lateral

result.note: Long-term poleward trend continues but annual direction prediction incorrect this week

predictions.title: Moon Angular Diameter Variation > V12 Threshold
predictions.description: Single-day within-night angular diameter variation matches V12 Dome prediction

v12_model_params.note: moon_radius back-calculated from 0.5° apparent diameter at zenith

prediction.note: V12 predicts 116.96% variation from distance change 10,040km to 21,783km. Globe predicts ~1-2% from diurnal parallax only.

predictions.mechanism: Moon at fixed altitude 2534km, distance from observer changes 2.17x over daily orbit
predictions.revision_note: Observed 1.27% strongly inconsistent with V12 prediction of 116.96%. Under revision: testing whether a different moon altitude could reduce predicted variation. Script confirms no altitude in range 1600-2534 km yields <2% prediction. W021 altitude parameter TBD before logging as falsified.

predictions.title: SAA Western Cell West of 45°W
predictions.description: The South Atlantic Anomaly western (South American) cell minimum is located west of 45°W longitude
predictions.mechanism: Aetheric vortex structure places western cell at ~60°W per CHAOS-7 baseline

result.verdict: CONFIRMED: western cell at ~60°W, well west of 45°W threshold

predictions.title: Moon Physical Altitude Constraint from Angular Variation
predictions.description: V12 moon altitude constraint: no altitude in 1600-2534 km returns observed 1.27% angular diameter variation at Chapel Hill. Next month's observation should also show ~1.27% ± 0.3%.

derivation.formula: d_total = sqrt((moon_x - obs_x)^2 + moon_y^2 + h^2); theta = 2*arctan(r_moon/d_total)

variables.r_moon: h * tan(0.25°) — back-calculated from 0.5° apparent diameter

derivation.result: V12 predicts 116-120% variation for any altitude 1600-2534 km. Observed: 1.27%.
derivation.conclusion: No V12 altitude parameter is consistent with observation. Constraint: if V12 is correct, moon altitude < ~30 km (ludicrous for daily orbit geometry)

predictions.mechanism: Distance-angular diameter relationship in flat disc geometry
predictions.falsification: Confirmed next month if angular diameter variation is again ~1.27%

predictions.title: Polaris Elevation at Oslo Diverges from WGS84 Latitude
predictions.description: Calibrated inclinometer at Oslo (59.91°N WGS84) will measure Polaris at 63-65°, not 59.91°. Globe requires exact match. V12 h(r) topographic correction predicts +3-5° divergence.

variables.r_observer: disc distance from pole to Oslo
variables.h(r): topographic correction, V10 form: H_mountain * exp(-r/decay)

derivation.note: Critical test: globe and dome make numerically distinct predictions at Oslo latitude

predictions.mechanism: North pole mountain topographic lensing of Polaris position in dome geometry
predictions.falsification: Polaris elevation within 0.5° of WGS84 latitude (59.91°) — dome falsified for h(r) mechanism

predictions.title: SAA Cell Separation Increases ≥0.8° by September 2026
predictions.description: SAA longitude separation between SA and African cells will increase by ≥0.8° from March 2026 to September 2026 CHAOS-7 update
predictions.mechanism: Exponential aetheric vortex repulsion between SAA cells
predictions.falsification: Separation stable or decreasing — would be direct contradiction of WIN-004 trend
